law_title_en: Bylaw on the Manner of Use of Land and National Resources in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: آئين نامه نحوه استفاده از زمين و منابع ملي در مناطق آزاد تجاري ـ صنعتي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: This 2021 bylaw sets land and national-resource use rules inside free trade-industrial zones, the incentive package these zones use to attract investors, directly overlapping the 2019-2021 window this provincial investment chart covers.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Manner of Use of Land and National Resources in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: آئين نامه نحوه استفاده از زمين و منابع ملي در مناطق آزاد تجاري ـ صنعتي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
targets_named_charts: Foreign direct investment, net inflows (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Free-zone land-use incentives are a standard lever aimed at attracting foreign direct investment, giving this bylaw a real if narrow channel to Iran's FDI inflow series.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on Settling Government Debts and Claims Through Treasury Settlement Bonds
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي جزء هاي  1  و  2  بند   ... ز طريق انتشار اسناد  اوراق  تسويه خزانه
current_justification_en: This 2025 bylaw governs issuance of treasury settlement securities (a domestic bond instrument used to settle government arrears to contractors and suppliers), a direct addition to recorded government debt.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on Temporary Import of Raw Materials under Article 12 of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ورود موقت مواد اوليه موضوع ماده 12 قانون صادرات و واردات
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, simple mean, all products
current_justification_en: This 1995 bylaw permits temporary duty-suspended import of raw materials under the export/import law, a named customs-policy channel that lowers the effective cost and eases the volume of manufacturing input imports.

law_title_en: Nursing Services Tariff-Setting and Nursing Incentive Pay Adjustment Act
law_title_fa: قانون تعرفه گذاري خدمات پرستاري و تعديل كارانه هاي  پرستاري
current_justification_en: This 2007 instrument sets nursing service tariffs and incentive pay, a direct wage/compensation lever for the nursing workforce that WDI's nurses-and-midwives headcount tracks.

law_title_en: Nursing Services Tariff-Setting and Nursing Incentive Pay Adjustment Act
law_title_fa: قانون تعرفه گذاري خدمات پرستاري و تعديل كارانه هاي  پرستاري
targets_named_charts: Domestic general government health expenditure (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: As a wage/tariff-setting instrument inside the public health system, this measure is one of many inputs into government health spending as a share of GDP.

law_title_en: Act on the Addition of a Note to the Act Amending Tables No. (4) and (8) of the Fourth Economic, Social and Cultural Development Plan Act of the Islamic Republic of Iran and the National Budget Act for Year 1385 (2006-2007), for the Purpose of Allocating Two Percent (2%) of Revenue from Crude Oil and Natural Gas Exports to Oil- and Gas-Producing Provinces and Deprived Counties and Districts of the Country
law_title_fa: قانون الحاق يك تبصره به قانون اصلاح جداول شماره (4) و (8) قانون برنامه چهارم توسعه اقتصادي، اجتماعي و فرهنگي جمهوري اسلا
targets_named_charts: Capital Expenditure Budget Execution Share by Province
current_justification_en: This 2007 amendment revises the revenue-allocation tables that channel a share of oil and gas revenue back to producing provinces, the same fiscal-transfer-to-provinces mechanism this chart's later capital-expenditure shares reflect.

law_title_en: Act on the Annulment of Documents and Sale of Endowed (Vaqf) Properties, Water, and Lands
law_title_fa: قانون ابطال اسناد و فروش رقبات، آب و اراضي موقوفه
targets_named_charts: Annual freshwater withdrawals, agriculture (% of total freshwater withdrawal)
current_justification_en: This 1993 law voids certain endowment (vaqf) land deeds and authorizes sale of that land and its attached water rights, a real if narrow channel into agricultural land and irrigation-water use.

law_title_en: Act Amending the Act on Increasing Agricultural Credit
law_title_fa: قانون مربوط باصلاح قانون افزايش اعتبارات كشاورزي
targets_named_charts: Bank Credit to Bank Deposits (World Bank GFDD)
Agriculture, forestry, and fishing, value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: This 1960 amendment increases appropriations for agricultural credit, a direct farm-financing instrument that feeds into overall bank credit activity and, through farm investment, agricultural value added.

law_title_en: Act Adding One Article to the Act on the Collection of Certain State Revenues and Their Expenditure for Specified Purposes
law_title_fa: قانون الحاق يك ماده به قانون وصول برخي از درآمدهاي دولت و مصرف آن در موارد معين
current_justification_en: This 2005 amendment adds a clause to the law on collection of certain state revenues, a narrow revenue-collection instrument with a real but minor channel into total and other-tax revenue.

law_title_en: Bill Adding a Note as Note 2 to the Bill Exempting Vegetable Oil from Customs Duty
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني الحاق يك تبصره بعنوان تبصره 2 به لايحه قانوني معافيت حقوق گمركي روغن نباتي
current_justification_en: This 1980 amendment expands the customs duty exemption for vegetable oil, its explicit instrument directly lowering the import cost of this staple good, the exact commodity these trade and consumption charts track.

law_title_en: Bill Adding a Note as Note 2 to the Bill Exempting Vegetable Oil from Customs Duty
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني الحاق يك تبصره بعنوان تبصره 2 به لايحه قانوني معافيت حقوق گمركي روغن نباتي
current_justification_en: Lower import duty on vegetable oil has a real, named channel to the domestic price of oil-equivalent oilcrops, a substitute and input good in the same market.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw on the Issuance of Two Hundred Billion ... under Note 40 of the Budget Law for the Year 1380 (2001/02)
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي انتشار دويست ميلي ...  تبصره  40  قانون بودجه سال 1380 كل كشور
targets_named_charts: Government Debt to the Central Bank
current_justification_en: Amends the bylaw for issuing 200 billion rials of participation bonds under budget note 40 of FY1380, a domestic public-debt instrument used to finance a specific budget line.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of the Law on the Sale of Organizational (Government-Owned) Housing
law_title_fa: آئيننامه اجرائي قانون فروش خانه هاي سازماني
current_justification_en: Implementing bylaw for the sale of government (organizational) housing units to occupants, an asset-divestiture measure that shifted a slice of the housing stock from state to private ownership.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Law on the Manner of Transferring Ownership and Managing Industrial Estates
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي قانون نحوه واگذاري مالكيت و اداره امور شهرك هاي صنعتي
targets_named_charts: Industrial Production Value Share by Province
Industrial Workshop Count Share by Province
current_justification_en: Amends the bylaw governing transfer of ownership and management of industrial estates to the private sector, part of the broader privatization program affecting the industrial-park sector that underlies provincial industrial output and workshop counts.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 6 of the Executive Bylaw on the Financial Classification ... and Marketing of Enterprises Subject to Transfer (Privatization)
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  6  آيين نامه اجرايي نحوه طبق ... مالي و بازاريابي بنگاه هاي مشمول واگذاري
targets_named_charts: Market capitalization of listed domestic companies
Market capitalization of listed domestic companies (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Amends the valuation and marketing-procedure bylaw for state enterprises subject to Article 44 privatization; procedures of this kind determine how and when former state-owned firms are floated on the stock exchange, feeding directly into listed-company counts and market capitalization.

law_title_en: Amendment to Note 4 of Article 3 and to Article 16 of the Executive Bylaw for the Expansion of Quick-Return, Entrepreneurial Small Enterprises
law_title_fa: اصلاح تبصره (4) الحاقي ماده (3) و ماده (16) آيين نامه اجرايي گسترش بنگاههاي كوچك اقتصادي زودبازده و كارآفرين
targets_named_charts: Unemployment, total (% of total labor force) (modeled ILO estimate)
Domestic credit to private sector by banks (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Amendment to the framework for small, quick-return, job-creating economic enterprises, a subsidized-credit and employment-generation program aimed directly at expanding private-sector lending and reducing unemployment.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Terms and Guarantee of Electricity Purchase under Clause (B), Article (25) of the Fourth Economic, Social and Cultural Development Plan Act of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي شرايط و تضمين خريد برق  ... دي، اجتماعي و فرهنگي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
targets_named_charts: Renewable electricity output (% of total electricity output)
Electricity production from renewable sources, excluding hydroelectric
Renewable energy consumption (% of total final energy consumption)
current_justification_en: National implementing bylaw (under the Fourth Development Plan) establishing guaranteed purchase terms and prices for electricity sold to the grid by independent producers, the classic feed-in-tariff mechanism that is the direct policy lever behind growth in renewable/non-utility electricity output.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Terms and Guarantee of Electricity Purchase under Clause (B), Article (25) of the Fourth Economic, Social and Cultural Development Plan Act of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي شرايط و تضمين خريد برق  ... دي، اجتماعي و فرهنگي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: By opening electricity generation and sale to independent (non-governmental) producers, the bylaw is part of the broader liberalization of Iran's electricity market that shapes long-run consumption and access trends.

law_title_en: Operational Bylaw and General Terms of Water and Wastewater Tariffs
law_title_fa: آئين نامه عملياتي و شرايط عمومي تعرفه هاي آب و فاضلاب
targets_named_charts: Consumer Price Index by COICOP Group (1395=100, SH1390-1399)
current_justification_en: Nationwide operating regulation setting the general conditions and procedure for water and wastewater tariffs, a recurring utility charge that sits within the housing/water/electricity COICOP division of the consumer price index.

law_title_en: Directive on the Registration and Public Offering of Securities
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل ثبت و عرضۀ عمومي اوراق بهادار
targets_named_charts: Market capitalization of listed domestic companies
Market capitalization of listed domestic companies (% of GDP)
Stocks traded, total value (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Directive governing the registration and public offering of securities, the core procedural gateway through which companies list and issue securities on Iran's capital market, directly shaping the pipeline of listed firms and traded value.

law_title_en: Directive on the Activity of Over-the-Counter (OTC) Markets
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل فعاليت بازارهاي خارج از بورس
targets_named_charts: Market capitalization of listed domestic companies
current_justification_en: Directive establishing the regulatory framework for Iran's over-the-counter (Fara Bourse) securities market, which substantially expanded the pool of listed/traded companies beyond the main exchange.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Clause (c) of Note 20 of the Budget Law for the Year 1382 (2003/04)
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي بند  پ  تبصره  20  قانون بودجه سال 1382 كل كشور
targets_named_charts: Domestic credit to private sector by banks (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Implementing bylaw for group domestic credit insurance under budget note 20 of FY1382, a scheme that reduces lender risk and so can support private-sector credit expansion.

law_title_en: Bylaw No. 25 on the Fire and Supplementary-Risk Insurance Tariff
law_title_fa: آئين نامه شماره 25 راجع به تعرفه بيمه آتش سوزي و خطرات اضافي
current_justification_en: Regulation number 25 setting mandated fire-insurance and additional-hazard tariff rates, a direct price-setting instrument for that specific insurance class.

law_title_en: Bylaw No. 35 on the Minimum Premium and Coverage Limits of Compulsory Third-Party Motor Vehicle Civil Liability Insurance and the Liability of the Bodily-Injury Compensation Fund
law_title_fa: آئين نامه شماره 35 درخصوص حداقل حق بيمه  ... ث و ميزان تعهد صندوق تأمين خسارتهاي بدني
targets_named_charts: Iranian Insurance Market: Direct Premium Written & Growth Rate
Iranian Insurance Market: Earned Premium, Incurred Loss & Loss Ratio
current_justification_en: Regulation number 35 setting minimum premium and coverage levels tied to the bodily-injury compensation fund (third-party motor insurance), a direct price/coverage-setting instrument for a major insurance line.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 137 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court on the Annulment of the Civil Aviation Supreme Council's Decision Liberalizing Passenger and Cargo Air Transport Rates
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 137 هيئت عمومي ديوان عدالت ادا ... آزادسازي نرخ حمل و نقل هوايي مسافر و بار
current_justification_en: Court ruling striking down regulator-set domestic air passenger and cargo fares, part of the liberalization of airfare pricing that affects demand for air travel.

law_title_en: Annulment of the Civil Aviation Supreme Council's Decision on Setting Passenger and Cargo Air Transport Rates
law_title_fa: ابطال مصوبه شوراي عالي هواپيمايي كشوري درخصوص تعيين نرخ حمل و نقل هوايي مسافر و بار
current_justification_en: Court ruling annulling the Civil Aviation Council's resolution fixing domestic passenger and cargo air fares, the same fare-deregulation episode as the companion 2003 ruling, affecting the pricing environment for domestic air travel.

law_title_en: Administrative Justice Court General Board Ruling No. 584-585 on Raising Government Employees' and Pensioners' Pay in Line with the Inflation Rate
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 584 ـ 585 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدا ... نان و بازنشستگان دولت متناسب با نرخ تورم
targets_named_charts: Social Security Organization Pensioners & Amounts Paid, by Category (1991-2006)
current_justification_en: Court ruling requiring that retiree and pensioner benefits be adjusted proportionate to the inflation rate, a direct instrument governing the real value of pension payouts tracked by this chart's series.

law_title_en: Administrative Justice Court General Board Ruling No. 313 Annulling Clause 1 of Resolution No. 263 of the Iran Electricity Market Regulatory Board
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 313 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت ادا ... د 1 مصوبه 263 هيات تنظيم بازار برق ايران
targets_named_charts: Renewable electricity output (% of total electricity output)
current_justification_en: Court ruling annulling part of a resolution by Iran's Electricity Market Regulation Board, the national body setting wholesale power-market pricing rules that shape electricity output, consumption, and the commercial terms facing generators including renewables.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Article 10 of the Comprehensive Livestock Husbandry System Act
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ماده 10 قانون نظام جامع دامپروري كشور
current_justification_en: Implementing regulation for Article 10 of Iran's Comprehensive Livestock System Law, governing registration, licensing and oversight of livestock operations; part of the regulatory backdrop for national meat and dairy output.

law_title_en: Amendment to Decree No. 125573/T54803H ... Concerning the Bylaw on Technical Rules for Vehicle Imports
law_title_fa: اصلاح تصويب نامه شماره 125573 ت 54803 هـ ...  موضوع آيين نامه ضوابط فني واردات خودرو
targets_named_charts: National Motor Vehicle Production (incl. Paykan/Iran Khodro Milestones)
current_justification_en: Amends the technical-standards bylaw for automobile imports; tightening or loosening import standards is a classic protectionist lever that shapes the competitive position of domestic vehicle production.

law_title_en: Executive Regulations of the National Budget Act for the Year 1390 (2011)
law_title_fa: ضوابط اجرايي قانون بودجه سال 1390 كل كشور
targets_named_charts: Total Country Budget: Resources & Uses Breakdown (SH1385-1400)
current_justification_en: General executive rules implementing the entire FY1390 (2011/12) national budget law across all its fiscal provisions; the direct operational instrument that determined that year's government spending and revenue execution.

law_title_en: Executive Regulations of the National Budget Act for the Year 1390 (2011)
law_title_fa: ضوابط اجرايي قانون بودجه سال 1390 كل كشور
current_justification_en: As the operational rules for the annual national budget, a national-scale fiscal instrument, it is part of the government-spending channel that any serious account of that year's GDP and per-capita GDP must consider.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw on the Collection of Duties in Free Trade-Industrial Zones
law_title_fa: اصلاح آئين نامه اجرايي اخذ عوارض در مناطق آزاد تجاري ـ صنعتي
targets_named_charts: Taxes on international trade (% of revenue)
current_justification_en: Amends the bylaw for collecting duties and fees within Iran's free trade-industrial zones, a narrow revenue-collection mechanism feeding into international-trade tax revenue.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Manner of Collecting Airport Duty for Trips Abroad
law_title_fa: آئيننامه نحوه دريافت عوارض فرودگاهي براي سفرهاي خارج از كشور
current_justification_en: Sets an airport departure fee charged on outbound international travelers, a minor other-tax revenue instrument for the government.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Payment of Transport Subsidies for Exported Goods in Special Cases
law_title_fa: آيين نامه پرداخت يارانه حمل و نقل به كالاهاي صادراتي در موارد خاص
current_justification_en: Pays a transport subsidy on export goods in special cases, a minor trade-promotion instrument that lowers logistics costs for exporters and could marginally support merchandise export volumes.

law_title_en: Cabotage Bylaw
law_title_fa: آئين نامه كابوتاژ
targets_named_charts: National-Flag Merchant Fleet Carrying Capacity by Ship Type (2005-2024)
Trade in Transport Services: Export Share & Values (2005-2024)
current_justification_en: Foundational cabotage regulation reserving domestic coastal shipping trade to Iranian-flag vessels, part of the long-standing legal backdrop for the national merchant fleet and maritime transport-services trade.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 5 of the Executive Bylaw of Article 10 of the Targeted Subsidies Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمندكردن يارانه ها
current_justification_en: Amends Article 5 of the implementing bylaw for Article 10 of the Subsidy Targeting Law, Iran's core mechanism for setting energy/goods subsidy levels and redistributing the proceeds as cash transfers; subsidy-targeting decisions are a direct driver of both inflation and the government's subsidy/transfer spending.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 5 of the Executive Bylaw of Article 10 of the Targeted Subsidies Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمندكردن يارانه ها
current_justification_en: Cash-transfer levels set under the subsidy-targeting bylaw directly affect household disposable income and are a standard input to poverty/inequality measurement in this exact period.

law_title_en: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمندكردن يارانه ها
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمندكردن يارانه ها
current_justification_en: Appears to be a duplicate registry filing of the amendment to Article 5 of the Article 10 subsidy-targeting implementing bylaw (see law 9829f2358654); shares the same substantive link to subsidy-driven inflation and transfer spending.

law_title_en: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمندكردن يارانه ها
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمندكردن يارانه ها
current_justification_en: Same substantive cash-transfer channel as the parallel filing (law 9829f2358654): levels set under this bylaw affect household disposable income measured in this period.

law_title_en: Determination of the Commercial Profit Rate for Goods Covered by the Tariff Lines Annexed to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act for Implementation in 1389 (2010)
law_title_fa: تعيين سود بازرگاني كالاهاي مشمول رديفهاي تعرفه جداول پيوست آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات براي اجرا در سا
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, simple mean, all products
Tariff rate, applied, weighted mean, all products
current_justification_en: Sets the commercial-profit (tariff) rates applied to imported goods for fiscal year 1389 (2010/11); the direct legal instrument that fixes the applied tariff rate on merchandise imports for that year.

law_title_en: Determination of the Commercial Profit Rate for Goods Covered by the Tariff Lines Annexed to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act for Fiscal Year 1388 (2009)
law_title_fa: تعيين سود بازرگاني كالاهاي مشمول رديف ها ... يي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات سال 1388
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, simple mean, all products
Tariff rate, applied, weighted mean, all products
current_justification_en: Sets the commercial-profit (tariff) rates applied to imported goods for fiscal year 1388 (2009/10) under the Import/Export Regulations Law; the direct legal instrument fixing that year's applied tariff rate.

law_title_en: Amendment to Articles 32, 33 and 49 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح مواد 32 و 33 و 49 آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: Amends specific procedural articles (32, 33, 49) of the bylaw implementing the Import/Export Regulations Law, part of the ongoing administrative framework governing merchandise trade flows.

law_title_en: Correction Letter to the Amendment of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: نامه اصلاحي  اصلاحيه آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: General amendment to the bylaw implementing the Import/Export Regulations Law, part of the administrative trade-policy framework in force in the early 2000s.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Table Annexed to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح جدول ضميمه آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, simple mean, all products
Tariff rate, applied, weighted mean, all products
current_justification_en: Amends the tariff schedule annex attached to the Import/Export Regulations implementing bylaw, a direct if narrow adjustment to specific applied tariff lines.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act, with Subsequent Amendments and Additions
law_title_fa: اصلاح آیین‌نامه اجرایی قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات با اصلاحات و الحاقات بعدی
current_justification_en: Amendment, with subsequent modifications, to the bylaw implementing the Import/Export Regulations Law, part of the administrative trade framework in the early 2000s.

law_title_en: Bylaw No. 2368/T22623K Dated the 27th ... of the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: آيين نامه شماره  2368 ت 22623ك مورخ 27   ... ق آزاد تجاري ـ صنعتي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
targets_named_charts: Exports of goods and services (annual % growth)
Imports of goods and services (annual % growth)
current_justification_en: Establishes operating regulations for one of Iran's free trade-industrial zones, instruments meant to attract investment and boost trade flows through tax and customs exemptions; part of the trade and investment-climate regime.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Article 27 of the Anti-Smuggling of Goods and Currency Act
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  27  قانون مبارزه با قاچاق كالا و ارز
current_justification_en: Implementing bylaw for Article 27 of the Anti-Smuggling of Goods and Currency Law, targeting currency and goods smuggling that thrives on the gap between official and parallel exchange rates and distorts recorded trade flows.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Issuance of Four Hundred Billion ... under Note 40 of the Budget Law for the Year 1380 (2001/02)
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي انتشار چهارصد ميليارد  ...  تبصره  40  قانون بودجه سال 1380 كل كشور
targets_named_charts: Government Debt to the Central Bank
current_justification_en: Implementing bylaw for issuing 400 billion rials in government bonds under Note 40 of the FY1380 (2001/02) budget law, a direct domestic public-debt instrument.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Article 8 of the Act on Increasing Productivity in the Agriculture and Natural Resources Sector
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  8  قانون افزايش بهره وري بخش كشاورزي و منابع طبيعي
current_justification_en: This 2014 bylaw lets the Ministry of Agriculture lease national/state land on the edges of cities to private operators for agricultural productivity projects, part of the broader 2010 Law on Increasing Agricultural Sector Productivity that governs land use and modernization in the sector.

law_title_en: Circular of the Trade Promotion Organization of Iran on Changes to the Exchange Rate Used as the Basis for Calculating Import Duties
law_title_fa: بخشنامه سازمان توسعه تجارت ايران درخصوص  ...  تغييرات نرخ ارز مبناي محاسبه حقوق ورودي
current_justification_en: This 2025 circular from Iran's Trade Promotion Organization changes the exchange rate used as the basis for calculating customs import duties, directly altering the rial value of duties collected on the same physical volume of imports.

law_title_en: Circular of the Trade Promotion Organization of Iran on Changes to the Exchange Rate Used as the Basis for Calculating Import Duties
law_title_fa: بخشنامه سازمان توسعه تجارت ايران درخصوص  ...  تغييرات نرخ ارز مبناي محاسبه حقوق ورودي
current_justification_en: The circular references and applies an official exchange rate for customs purposes, illustrating how Iran's multi-tier FX regime feeds into trade administration even though it does not itself set the market rate.

law_title_en: Decree No. 33578/T26504H Dated the 15th ... Concerning Government Discretionary Punishments (Ta'zirat) Related to the Smuggling of Goods and Currency
law_title_fa: تصويبنامه شماره 33578 ت 26504هـ مورخ 15  ...  تعزيرات حكومتي راجع به قاچاق كالا و ارز
current_justification_en: This 2002 amendment restructures how confiscation proceeds and informant bounties are distributed among anti-smuggling agencies under Iran's Law on Discretionary Punishments for Goods and Currency Smuggling, part of the state's enforcement apparatus against informal trade.

law_title_en: Resolution Adding Two Clauses to Article 43 of the Executive Bylaw of the 1988 Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: تصويب نامه راجع به الحاق دو بند به ماده  ... ئي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات سال 1367
current_justification_en: Adopted near the end of the Iran-Iraq War in 1988, this bylaw let ministries with industrial companies use export foreign-exchange proceeds to barter-import raw materials and machine parts from Eastern- and Western-bloc countries, part of the war-economy's improvised trade and FX-allocation arrangements.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 2002 amendment to the executive bylaw of the Export-Import Regulations Law sets transitional shipping deadlines for goods licensed before an import restriction changed, a narrow customs-administration adjustment within Iran's general trade-licensing framework.

law_title_en: Amendment to Added Note (5) of Article (11) of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act, with Subsequent Amendments and Additions
law_title_fa: اصلاح تبصره (۵) الحاقی ماده (۱۱) آیین‌نامه اجرایی قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات با اصلاحات و الحاقات بعدی
current_justification_en: This 2017 amendment clarifies when goods warehoused in Iran's free trade and special economic zones are deemed to have formally entered the customs territory, a technical customs-timing rule under the general Export-Import Regulations bylaw.

law_title_en: Amendment to Note 2 of Article 31 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح تبصره 2 ماده  31  آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1995 amendment revises the duty-free and reduced-duty value bands for goods carried by incoming travelers, a minor personal-imports carve-out within the general Export-Import Regulations bylaw.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 5 of the Executive Bylaw of Articles 5 and 6 of the Anti-Smuggling of Goods and Currency Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي مواد  5  و  6  قانون مبارزه با قاچاق كالا و ارز
current_justification_en: This 2017 amendment orders the Central Bank, together with the Ministry of Industry and customs, to build and operate a currency-tracking system under the 2015 Anti-Smuggling of Goods and Currency Law, part of the state's effort to formalize FX flows and narrow the gap between official and informal exchange rates.

law_title_en: Regulation on the Use of Foreign Exchange Earned from Goods Exports by Exporters
law_title_fa: نحوه استفاده از ارز حاصل از صادرات كالا توسط صادركنندگان
current_justification_en: This 1996 decision let exporters use 30-50% of their retained foreign-exchange earnings to directly import goods under Trade Ministry authorization, a real incentive mechanism that tied export performance to import access during a period of foreign-exchange scarcity and multiple exchange rates.

law_title_en: Executive Directive on Monetary and Banking Operations in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل اجرائي عمليات پولي و بانكي در مناطق آزاد تجاري  ـ صنعتي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: This 2000 Money and Credit Council instruction establishes a separate banking and monetary regime, including offshore banking units and free-floating FX rates, for Iran's free trade and industrial zones, a distinct institutional carve-out from the mainland financial system.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of Article 7 of the Act on the Implementation of the General Policies of Article 44 of the Constitution
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي ماده   7   قانون  ... سياستهاي كلي اصل چهل و چهارم قانون اساسي
current_justification_en: This 2009 amendment restricts government agencies from demanding documents or issuing business licenses without explicit legal authorization, implementing Article 7 of the law executing Iran's Article 44 general privatization policies, part of the national program to reduce state economic control and ease private business entry.

law_title_en: General Rules on the Initial or Block Public Offering of State-Owned Companies' Shares on the Stock Exchange
law_title_fa: ضوابط كلي عرضه اوليه يا عمده سهام شركت هاي دولتي مشمول واگذاري در بورس
current_justification_en: Issued in 2008 by the High Council of the Securities and Exchange Organization, this rule set the disclosure, minimum float and clearing requirements for listing shares of state-owned companies divested under Article 44 privatization on the Tehran Stock Exchange, a direct mechanism behind the wave of state-company listings that expanded the exchange in the late 2000s and 2010s.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of the Drought Damage Compensation and Prevention Act
law_title_fa: آيين نامه  اجرايي  قانون  جبران  و پيشگيري  عوارض  ناشي  از خشكسالي
current_justification_en: This 1999 bylaw implements Iran's Law on Compensation and Prevention of Drought-caused Damages, channeling subsidized bank loans and reconstruction funds to farmers, herders and flood victims (notably the 1999 Mazandaran floods), part of the state's response to the severe multi-year drought that hit Iranian agriculture from the late 1990s.

law_title_en: Bylaw No. 9708/T22995H Dated the 23rd ... on Compensation for Damages and Prevention of Effects Caused by Drought
law_title_fa: آيين نامه شماره 9708 ت 22995هـ مورخ 23   ... ن خسارات و پيشگيري عوارض ناشي از خشكسالي
current_justification_en: This 2000 bylaw operationalizes the follow-on Law on Compensation for Damages and Prevention of Drought-caused Effects, earmarking a nationwide 0.3% levy on public and state-enterprise budgets plus dedicated Agricultural Bank credit lines for farmers, herders, fish-farmers and pastoralist households hit by Iran's late-1990s drought, and for small-scale water infrastructure (check dams, qanat repai

law_title_en: Decree Concerning the Amendment of Table No. (1) under Clause (a) of Article (1) of the Executive Bylaw of the Act on Compensation for and Prevention of the Effects of Drought
law_title_fa: تصويبنامه راجع به اصلاح جدول شماره(1)موضوع بند(الف)ماده(1)آيين نامه اجرايي قانون جبران وپيشگيري عوارض ناشي ازخشكسالي
current_justification_en: This late-1999 decision reallocates a small sum (7 billion rials) between line items of the drought-compensation bylaw's budget table and reassigns the input-subsidy line from the Agriculture Ministry to a state agricultural-services company, a narrow budget-table correction within the same drought relief scheme.

law_title_en: Administrative Justice Court General Board Ruling No. 1022 on the Value Added Tax Exemption for Crude Vegetable Oil
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 1022 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت اد ...  ماليات بر ارزش افزوده بر روغن نباتي خام
current_justification_en: This Divan-e Edalat-e Edari ruling enforces the VAT law's exemption for crude (unrefined) vegetable oil supply and imports, correcting the tax administration's implementation date back to 2008; VAT-exempt status directly affects the retail cost passed through on a household staple.

law_title_en: Administrative Justice Court General Board Ruling No. 1022 on the Value Added Tax Exemption for Crude Vegetable Oil
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 1022 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت اد ...  ماليات بر ارزش افزوده بر روغن نباتي خام
targets_named_charts: Taxes on goods and services (% of revenue)
current_justification_en: Confirming a VAT exemption for a specific commodity marginally narrows the VAT base and thus goods-and-services tax revenue, though vegetable oil is a small share of the base.

law_title_en: Environmental Standards for Mining Activities
law_title_fa: ضوابط زيست محيطي فعاليتهاي معدني
current_justification_en: This 2005 bylaw sets nationwide environmental compliance standards for mining operations (site rehabilitation, waste/tailings, water and air standards), a regulatory cost and licensing constraint touching the entire domestic mining sector.

law_title_en: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمندكردن يارانه ها
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمندكردن يارانه ها
current_justification_en: This 2025 amendment to the implementing bylaw of Article 10 of the Subsidy Targeting Law directly governs the mechanics of Iran's targeted cash-subsidy transfers, a core lever behind the government's subsidies-and-transfers expenditure line.

law_title_en: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمندكردن يارانه ها
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  5  آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمندكردن يارانه ها
current_justification_en: Subsidy-targeting cash transfers are a central pillar of Iran's post-2010 inflation and energy-pricing regime; changes to disbursement mechanics under this law sit within that broader policy family that shapes headline CPI.

law_title_en: Act Extending the Act Authorizing the Government to Set Customs Duty and Commercial Profit Rates on Imported Goods (approved 1993)
law_title_fa: قانون تمديد مدت اجراي قانون اجازه تعيين ميزان حقوق گمركي و سود بازرگاني كالاهاي وارداتي توسط دولت مصوب 1372/7/27
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, simple mean, all products
Tariff rate, applied, weighted mean, all products
current_justification_en: This 1994 law extends the government's statutory authority to set customs-duty and commercial-profit (tariff) rates on imported goods for that year, a direct instrument setting the applied tariff schedule and the customs-duty revenue it generates.

law_title_en: Act Amending the 1382 (2003) Foreign Exchange Ceiling in the Third Economic, Social and Cultural Development Plan Act of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح سقف ارزي سال 1382 در قانون‌ برنامه سوم توسعه اقتصادي، اجتماعي و فرهنگي‌ جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: This 2003 amendment raises the Third Plan's 1382 (2003/04) foreign-exchange ceiling to $15.438bn and authorizes drawing on the Oil Reserve Account to cover the government's FX-unification-related debt to the Central Bank, tying the budget-year FX envelope to Iran's exchange-rate management during the 2002-03 unification period.

law_title_en: Act Amending the 1382 (2003) Foreign Exchange Ceiling in the Third Economic, Social and Cultural Development Plan Act of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح سقف ارزي سال 1382 در قانون‌ برنامه سوم توسعه اقتصادي، اجتماعي و فرهنگي‌ جمهوري اسلامي ايران
targets_named_charts: Government Debt to the Central Bank
current_justification_en: The law's proviso specifically authorizes using up to $2.5bn from the Oil Reserve Account to prevent an increase in the government's debt to the Central Bank stemming from the 2002 exchange-rate unification, a direct fiscal-monetary link to this debt series.

law_title_en: Act on Preventing Price Increases Through the End of the Third Development Plan
law_title_fa: قانون جلوگيري از افزايش قيمتها تا پايان برنامه سوم توسعه‌اقتصادي، اجتماعي و فرهنگي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: This 2003 law is a direct, economy-wide price-control instrument: it voids all government-set price/tariff increases outside the Third Development Plan's rules and orders a committee to roll them back within two weeks, explicitly framed as an anti-inflation ('control of inflation') measure; a national price-freeze law is a headline instrument any account of Iran's CPI/WPI path in this period shoul

law_title_en: Act on Preventing Price Increases Through the End of the Third Development Plan
law_title_fa: قانون جلوگيري از افزايش قيمتها تا پايان برنامه سوم توسعه‌اقتصادي، اجتماعي و فرهنگي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: The same law orders a mandatory diversion of up to 10% of the Majlis/Presidency/Judiciary budgets and up to 5% of every executive agency's operating budget into the essential-goods subsidy line to hold 2002 (1381) subsidy levels, a direct, quantified addition to the subsidies-and-transfers expenditure category.

law_title_en: Act on the Refund of Customs Duties on Raw Materials Used in Machine-Made Products of Domestic Factories
law_title_fa: قانون استرداد حقوق گمركي مواد اوليه مصنوعات ماشيني كارخانجات داخلي
current_justification_en: This 1966 duty-drawback law refunds customs duties on imported raw materials used by domestic machine-manufacturing factories, directly lowering the effective customs take on those inputs and supporting import-substitution industrialisation.

law_title_en: Act on the Exemption of Cement Exported from the Country from Customs Duties and Tariffs
law_title_fa: قانون معافيت سيمانهاي صادر از كشور از حقوق و عوارض گمركي
current_justification_en: This 1969 law exempts exported cement from customs duties and fees, a direct export-promotion instrument for the domestic cement industry during the period this chart covers.

law_title_en: Determination of Commercial Profit Margin for Goods under Tariff Codes Covered by the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: تعيين سود بازرگاني كالاهاي مشمول رديفهاي تعرفه جداول پيوست آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, simple mean, all products
Tariff rate, applied, weighted mean, all products
current_justification_en: This implementing bylaw of the Export/Import Regulations Act sets specific commercial-profit (tariff-equivalent) rates on named tariff lines, explicitly to protect domestic production; it is a direct instrument shaping the applied tariff schedule.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of the Act on the Independence of Provincial Electricity Distribution Companies
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي قانون استقلال شركتهاي توزيع نيروي برق در استانها
targets_named_charts: Electric power transmission and distribution losses (% of output)
Investment in energy with private participation
Public private partnerships investment in energy
current_justification_en: This 2007 bylaw restructures provincial electricity distribution companies into independent corporate entities under the Electricity Distribution Companies Independence Law, a governance reform to the power sector's organisation bearing on operational efficiency (transmission/distribution losses) and on the scope for private/PPP participation in energy.

law_title_en: Drought Damage Compensation and Prevention Act
law_title_fa: قانون جبران و پيشگيري عوارض ناشي از خشكسالي
current_justification_en: This 1999 law establishes compensation and prevention mechanisms for drought damage, a direct fiscal response to the severe 1999-2001 Iranian drought that hit rain-fed wheat and cereal output hardest.

law_title_en: Act on the Use of the Remaining Balance of Oil Signing Bonus Funds
law_title_fa: قانون مربوط به نحوه استفاده از بقيه موجودي وجوه پذيره نفت
targets_named_charts: Oil Revenue Distribution by Recipient (% share), 1957-1959
current_justification_en: This 1959 law directly governs how the remaining balance of oil concession subscription ('pazireh') funds is allocated between the budget, NIOC, the Plan Organization and other recipients, falling squarely within the exact 1955-63 window these Pahlavi-era oil-revenue-allocation charts track.

law_title_en: Act on the Provision of Development and General Credits
law_title_fa: قانون تأمين اعتبارات عمراني و عمومي
current_justification_en: This 1964 law secures financing for Iran's development ('omrani') and general government budget credits during the Third Development Plan era, a national-scale public-investment financing instrument of the kind that shaped Iran's growth and capital-formation trajectory through the 1960s; national development-financing laws of this era belong on the headline GDP and investment charts even though th

law_title_en: Act on the Transfer of the Chemical Fertilizer Distribution Joint Stock Company to the Ministry of Agriculture and Natural Resources
law_title_fa: قانون انتقال شركت سهامي پخش كود شيميائي بوزارت كشاورزي و منابع طبيعي
targets_named_charts: Fertilizer consumption (kilograms per hectare of arable land)
current_justification_en: This 1973 law transfers the state chemical-fertilizer distribution company to the Ministry of Agriculture and Natural Resources, consolidating a key farm-input supply channel under the ministry responsible for agricultural policy, with a direct bearing on fertilizer availability and use.

law_title_en: بخشنامه گمرك در خصوص ابلاغ سهميه كالاي همراه مسافر سه ماه نخست سال 1404 مناطق آزاد به همرا
law_title_fa: بخشنامه گمرك در خصوص ابلاغ سهميه كالاي همراه مسافر سه ماه نخست سال 1404 مناطق آزاد به همراه فهرست مربوطه
current_justification_en: This 2025 customs circular announces the annual (1404) import quota for free-trade-zone goods, a narrow, recurring administrative allocation within Iran's broader merchandise-import flow.

law_title_en: Interpretive Act Regarding Articles 1 and 13 of the Export and Import Regulations Act Adopted in 1372 (1993/94)
law_title_fa: قانون استفساريه نسبت به مواد  1  و  13  قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات مصوب 1372
current_justification_en: This 2001 interpretive law clarifies that non-oil exporters' foreign-exchange repatriation commitments made before the 1993 Export/Import Regulations Act remain governed by the rules in force when pledged, resolving legal uncertainty over FX-surrender obligations that shaped exporters' incentives during the 1990s multiple-exchange-rate era.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 1292 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court Annulling Clause 2 of Cabinet Resolution No. 101758/T57804H of 2020/12/01 on the Increase in the Price of Consumed Gas Where Consumption Exceeds the Same Period a Year Earlier, for Conflict with Law
law_title_fa: رأی شماره ۱۲۹۲ هیأت عمومی دیوان عدالت اداری با موضوع ابطال بند ۲ تصویبنامه شماره ۱۰۱۷۵۸ / ت ۵۷۸۰۴ ه مورخ ۱۳۹۹ / ۹ / ۱۱ ه
targets_named_charts: Consumer Price Index by COICOP Group (1395=100, SH1390-1399)
Natural Gas Reserves, Production, Exports, Imports & Demand (OPEC, 2020-2024)
current_justification_en: An Administrative Justice Court general-assembly ruling struck down a clause of a cabinet decree that would have raised residential natural-gas tariffs for above-average consumption, blocking a specific administrative price rise that would otherwise have fed into the energy/utilities component of consumer prices and into domestic gas demand data.

law_title_en: National Budget Act for 1385 (2006/07)
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1385 كل كشور
current_justification_en: This chart's totals are compiled directly from Iran's annual budget laws, so the FY1385 budget law is the primary source document for that year's plotted figure.

law_title_en: National Budget Act for 1385 (2006/07)
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1385 كل كشور
current_justification_en: As Iran's binding annual state budget, this law set the year's government spending, oil-revenue allocation and public-investment envelope, all first-order determinants of that year's GDP, government expenditure, capital formation and price level; any serious account of 1385/2006 macro aggregates must reference the enacted budget.

law_title_en: National Budget Act for the Year 1376
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1376 كل كشور
current_justification_en: This chart's totals are compiled directly from Iran's annual budget laws, so the FY1376 budget law is the primary source document for that year's plotted figure.

law_title_en: National Budget Act for the Year 1376
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1376 كل كشور
current_justification_en: As the binding annual state budget passed at the end of the Rafsanjani reconstruction era, this law set the year's spending, deficit financing and investment envelope, first-order determinants of GDP, government expenditure, capital formation and prices; any serious account of 1376/1997 macro aggregates must reference the enacted budget.

law_title_en: Act Amending the Annual Credit Tables and Other Tables Annexed to the Fourth National Development Plan
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح جداول اعتبارات سنواتي و ساير جداول پيوست برنامه عمراني چهارم كشور
current_justification_en: This law corrected the annual credit tables attached to Iran's Fourth Development Plan, the state's central multi-year investment programme during the late-1960s oil-boom industrialisation drive; as a technical amendment to a national development-plan budget it has a real, if narrow, channel into that period's public investment and GDP growth.

law_title_en: Budget Law for the Year 1341 (1962/63) of the Whole Country
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1341 كل كشور
current_justification_en: As Iran's binding annual state budget during the early Pahlavi development-plan era, this law set the year's government spending and investment envelope, a first-order determinant of that year's GDP, government expenditure and capital formation; any serious account of early-1960s macro aggregates must reference the enacted budget.

law_title_en: Act Adding Articles to the Act on Regulating Part of the Government's Financial Regulations (1)
law_title_fa: قانون الحاق موادی به قانون تنظیم بخشی از مقررات مالی دولت (۱) - مصوب ۱۳۸۰ / ۱۱ / ۲۷ با اصلاحات و الحاقات بعدی
current_justification_en: This law added provisions to the State Financial Regulations Law (1), a structural statute governing how government agencies collect and dispose of revenue, budget public enterprises and manage treasury procedures; as an amendment to the framework underlying government revenue and expenditure reporting, it bears on the government-finance aggregates broadly rather than any single narrow measure.

law_title_en: Act Amending Article 3 and Tables 4 and 8 of the Fourth Development Plan Act and Supplementing the National Budget for Year 1384
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح ماده  3  و جداول  4  و  8  ق ... لامي ايران و متمم بودجه سال 1384 كل كشور
current_justification_en: This law amended a specific article and the credit tables of the supplementary 1384 budget law, adjusting the government's spending tables for that year and so incrementally revising the totals a reader would associate with the FY1384 budget.

law_title_en: Budget Law for the Whole Country for the Year 1320 (1941/42)
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه كل سال 1320 كشور
current_justification_en: As the annual state budget for 1320 (1941/42), enacted amid the Allied occupation and abdication of Reza Shah, this law set that year's government spending framework during a formative period of the modern Iranian fiscal state, giving it genuine historical context for the country's earliest GDP and government-expenditure figures.

law_title_en: Act Adding Articles to the Act on Regulating Part of the Government's Financial Regulations (1)
law_title_fa: قانون الحاق موادي به قانون تنظيم بخشي از مقررات مالي دولت (1)
current_justification_en: This is the same substantive law as the other 'additions to the State Financial Regulations Law (1)' entry in this batch, captured from a different source archive; it added provisions to the structural statute governing how government agencies collect and dispose of revenue, budget public enterprises and manage treasury procedures, bearing on government-finance aggregates broadly.

law_title_en: Act Amending Article 60 and Table No. 2 of the Third Economic, Social and Cultural Development Plan Act and the National Budget Act for 1382 (2003)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح ماده  60  و جدول شماره  2  ق ... امي ايران و قانون بودجه سال 1382 كل كشور
current_justification_en: This law amended an article and credit table of the 1382 annual budget law, adjusting the government's spending allocations for that year and incrementally revising the totals associated with the FY1382 budget.

law_title_en: Act on the Transport and Transit of Foreign Goods through the Territory of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: قانون حمل و نقل و عبور كالاهاي خارجي از قلمرو جمهوري اسلامي ايران
targets_named_charts: Logistics performance index: Efficiency of customs clearance process
Trade in Transport Services: Export Share & Values (2005-2024)
current_justification_en: This law governs the transport and transit of foreign goods across Iranian territory, establishing the legal and fee regime for transit trade, a real named channel into customs clearance efficiency and Iran's exports of transport/transit services.

law_title_en: Act Approving the Agreement on Economic and Trade ... Cooperation between the Government of the Islamic Republic of Iran and the Government of the Kingdom of Bahrain
law_title_fa: قانون موافقتنامه همكاري هاي اقتصادي، باز ... جمهوري اسلامي ايران و دولت پادشاهي بحرين
targets_named_charts: Exports of goods and services (annual % growth)
Imports of goods and services (annual % growth)
current_justification_en: This law ratified an economic-cooperation and trade agreement between Iran and Bahrain, a real but narrow bilateral channel into Iran's total goods and services trade.
